title: Update Booking model to use new ApprovalEvaluator system
acceptance_criteria: Booking model no longer implements Approvable interface
HasApprovals trait removed from Booking model
getApprovalFlows() method removed from Booking model
New isApproved() method added using ApprovalEvaluator
New isPending() method added using ApprovalEvaluator
New isOpen() method added using ApprovalEvaluator
New isDenied() method added using ApprovalEvaluator
All other existing Booking functionality preserved (QR code, notifications, relationships)
